mapper.select: SELECT contract_id, approval_record_id, step_no, approver_role, decision, decision_time, comment_summary, linked_policy_ids_json, linked_clause_chunk_ids_json, risk_items_json, vector_doc_id FROM approval_records WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} ORDER BY step_no, approval_record_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO approval_records ( contract_id, approval_record_id, step_no, approver_role, decision, decision_time, comment_summary, linked_policy_ids_json, linked_clause_chunk_ids_json, risk_items_json, vector_doc_id ) VALUES
( #{r.contractId}, #{r.approvalRecordId}, #{r.stepNo}, #{r.approverRole}, #{r.decision}, #{r.decisionTime}, CAST(#{r.commentSummary} AS TEXT), CAST(#{r.linkedPolicyIdsJson} AS JSONB), CAST(#{r.linkedClauseChunkIdsJson} AS JSONB), CAST(#{r.riskItemsJson} AS JSONB), #{r.vectorDocId} )
